# init()

**Initializer**

Initializes a Wi-Fi client object.

## Declaration

```swift
init()
```

## Discussion

Instead of initializing a Wi-Fi client directly, consider using the shared instance available from the [doc://com.apple.corewlan/documentation/CoreWLAN/CWWiFiClient/shared()] class method.
title: init()
